analysisIncomplete: Analysis is not complete; cannot save.
analysisNoPermissionView: You don't have permission to view this analysis record.
analysisNoPermissionEdit: You don't have permission to modify this analysis record.
analysisNoPermissionDelete: You don't have permission to delete this analysis record.
analysisTaskNotFound: Analysis task not found or expired.
analysisTaskNoPermission: You don't have permission to access this analysis task.
analysisTaskCorrectNoPermission: You don't have permission to correct this analysis task.
sessionExpired: Analysis session expired, please re-upload the image.
sessionWrongStatus: This analysis task is not awaiting correction (it may be completed or invalidated).

betterForCurrentGoal: Better suited to your current goal.
analyzeSavedAsRecord: Analysis saved as a meal record.

analyze.imageUnrecognizable: Unable to identify image content, please upload a clearer food photo.
